summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of Tours & Travel Vehicle Booking System completed successfully. All core functionality verified including backend APIs, frontend UI, vehicle selection, quote generation, booking confirmation, and user interactions.

design_issues.issue: Could not locate all callback form input fields during testing

passed_tests: GET /api/vehicles returns all 15 vehicles with correct structure
GET /api/vehicles/sedan returns single vehicle with pricing
POST /api/getQuotation works for both outstation and local trip types
Homepage loads with all sections (Hero, Vehicle Grid, etc.)
Vehicle category filters work (All, Sedans, SUVs, Vans, Buses, Coaches)
Vehicle cards 'View Details' navigate to vehicle detail pages
Vehicle detail page shows pricing table and quick quote form
Quote result page displays price breakdown and booking confirmation
WhatsApp floating button is visible with correct phone number
Sticky navbar appears and works correctly
Calendar date pickers work for travel and return dates
Hero search bar quote generation flow works end-to-end
Vehicle detail page quote generation works correctly
Trip type selection (outstation/local) works in both hero and detail forms
All homepage sections visible: Why Choose Us, Destinations, How It Works, Testimonials, FAQ, CTA Banner, Footer
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (19/20 features tested successfully)
